# Ligature

<img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," alt="Ligature icon">

RSX</span></button></div></div>

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::Ligature;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        Ligature { size: 20, stroke: "red" }
    }
}
```
